mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_notification(id, event_type, title, content, sender_id, biz_type, biz_id, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{eventType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{senderId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{createTime})
INSERT INTO sys_notification_recipient(notification_id, recipient_user_id) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{recipientUserId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_id = VALUES(notification_id)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_notification_recipient WHERE recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND (is_read IS NULL OR is_read = 0)

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_notification_recipient r INNER JOIN sys_notification n ON n.id = r.notification_id WHERE r.recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND (r.is_read IS NULL OR r.is_read = 0) AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(n.event_type, ''))) = 'COMPLETED' AND UPPER(TRIM(n.biz_type)) IN ('REPAIR', 'PURCHASE', 'SUPPLIES_CLAIM')

SELECT n.id, n.event_type AS eventType, n.title, n.content, n.sender_id AS senderId, n.biz_type AS bizType, n.biz_id AS bizId, r.is_read AS isRead, r.read_time AS readTime, n.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_notification n INNER JOIN sys_notification_recipient r ON n.id = r.notification_id WHERE r.recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND (r.is_read IS NULL OR r.is_read = 0) AND UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(n.event_type, ''))) = 'COMPLETED' AND UPPER(TRIM(n.biz_type)) IN ('REPAIR', 'PURCHASE', 'SUPPLIES_CLAIM') ORDER BY n.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
